## Testing and Validation

- [ ] I reviewed the changed files.

## Module Checklist

Complete this section when adding or updating a developer module.

- [ ] `SKILL.md` is included.
- [ ] `CHECKLIST.md` is included.
- [ ] `examples.md` is included.
- [ ] `metadata.json` is included and valid.
- [ ] The module is placed in the correct domain.
